hero.badge: Now in public beta — free for teams under 5
hero.title: Build something
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one platform for modern teams to design, collaborate, and ship beautiful digital experiences — faster than ever before.

features.title: Everything your team needs
features.subtitle: From ideation to deployment, Ethereal gives every member of your team the tools they need to do their best work.

items.title: Blazing Fast
items.description: Optimized for performance out of the box. Pages load in milliseconds, not seconds — giving users the snappy experience they expect.

items.title: Beautiful by Default
items.description: Thoughtfully crafted components and layouts that look great from day one. No design degree required.

items.title: Secure & Reliable
items.description: Enterprise-grade security baked in. Role-based access, encrypted storage, and audit logs keep your data safe.

items.title: Extensible
items.description: A rich plugin ecosystem and open APIs let you connect Ethereal to any tool in your workflow.

items.title: Powerful Analytics
items.description: Real-time dashboards and reports give you the insight to make confident, data-driven decisions.

items.title: Built for Teams
items.description: Collaborative workflows, shared workspaces, and live cursors make working together feel effortless.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No lengthy setup. No complicated onboarding. Just three simple steps to transform how your team works.

steps.title: Create Your Workspace
steps.description: Sign up in seconds and set up your team workspace. Invite collaborators with a single click.

steps.title: Connect Your Tools
steps.description: Integrate with your favourite services — Slack, GitHub, Figma, and 50+ more — in minutes.

steps.title: Ship Faster
steps.description: Use our AI-powered workflows to automate repetitive tasks and focus on what matters most.

testimonials.title: Loved by builders everywhere
testimonials.subtitle: Don't just take our word for it — here's what teams using Ethereal have to say.

items.quote: Ethereal completely transformed how our team ships product. We cut release cycles from two weeks to two days. I can't imagine going back.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: The onboarding experience was genuinely delightful. We were productive from day one — no lengthy setup, no confusing docs.
items.name: Marcus Rivera

items.quote: Our design and engineering teams finally speak the same language. Ethereal's shared workspace is the missing piece we didn't know we needed.
items.name: Aisha Patel

cta.title: Ready to build something ethereal?
cta.subtitle: Join 50,000+ teams already using Ethereal. Free to start, no credit card required.
